heading: Today
text: Sunshine, mixing with mid and high-level clouds, then more afternoon sun.  Highs in the 40s north, near 50 south.  Winds light, becoming south less than 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming mostly cloudy, with a few stray snow or rain showers, mainly over the higher terrain. Lows in the low to mid 30s from I-89 west and south, 20s to near 30 northeast.  Winds becoming south near 10 mph from the Green Mountains west, and over the higher terrain east, light in wind-sheltered valleys.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly cloudy, with an isolated snow or rain shower, mainly over the higher terrain. Some breaks of afternoon sun west of the Green Mountains.  Highs in the 40s to low 50s north, 50 to 55 south.  Winds south near 10 mph, diminishing to light.
